2606.06217.title: DisasterBench: A Multimodal Benchmark for UAV-Based Disaster Response in Complex Environments
2606.06217.paper_summary: When a disaster unfolds, responders must answer not only what is happening, but also why it is happening, what will happen next, and what to do now, often from noisy low-altitude UAV views and under tight on-site compute constraints. However, most existing multimodal benchmarks emphasize perception (e.g., recognition/description), cover limited disaster types, and provide insufficient support for the multi-stage reasoning required in practical emergency response. We introduce DisasterBench, a multi-stage multimodal reasoning benchmark for UAV-Based disaster response in complex environments. DisasterBench spans 14 disaster-related scene types and 9 response-critical tasks across pre-, during-, and post-disaster stages, with fine-grained disaster-task mappings that explicitly test causal attribution, propagation prediction, damage analysis, and decision-oriented reasoning. To enable reasoning on the edge, we further propose DisasterVL, a lightweight multimodal model optimized with a three-stage pipeline combining domain instruction tuning, chain-of-thought-guided multimodal alignment, and reinforcement learning-based policy optimization. Experiments across 21 popular MLLMs show that our 2B-parameter DisasterVL outperforms all evaluated open-source models and substantially narrows the gap to state-of-the-art closed-source models, achieving GPT-4o-comparable reasoning accuracy with superior efficiency. The project page is available at https://github.com/TanmouTT/DisasterBench.
2606.06217.paper_summary_zh: 當災難發生時，應對者必須回答不僅是發生了什麼，還有為什麼會發生這些事情、接下來會發生什麼，以及現在該怎麼做，這通常是在嘈雜的低空無人機視角下，並在嚴格的現場計算限制下進行的。然而，大多數現有的多模態基準強調感知（例如，識別/描述），涵蓋的災難類型有限，並且對於實際應急響應中所需的多階段推理支持不足。我們介紹了DisasterBench，這是一個針對複雜環境中基於無人機的災難響應的多階段多模態推理基準。DisasterBench涵蓋了14種與災難相關的場景類型和9個響應關鍵任務，涵蓋災難發生的前、中、後階段，並提供細緻的災難任務映射，明確測試因果歸因、傳播預測、損害分析和決策導向推理。為了實現邊緣推理，我們進一步提出了DisasterVL，這是一個輕量級的多模態模型，經過優化，採用三階段管道，結合了領域指令調整、思維鏈引導的多模態對齊和基於強化學習的策略優化。在21個流行的MLLM上進行的實驗顯示，我們的2B參數DisasterVL超越了所有評估的開源模型，並大幅縮小了與最先進的閉源模型之間的差距，實現了與GPT-4o可比擬的推理準確性，並具有更高的效率。項目頁面可在https://github.com/TanmouTT/DisasterBench訪問。
2606.06217.author: Tan Zhang et.al.
2606.06217.authors: Tan Zhang, Quanyou Li, Lu Zhang, Jun Liu, Xiaofeng Zhu, Ping Hu
